sys_template.name: EV Incident Non-Operational
sys_template.template: description=Issue Description: The EV Plug electric charger is not functioning correctly. Specific symptoms include: (Marked questions as YES/NO) Is the charger fails to initiate or establish a connection with the vehicle? Is the display shows an error code or a “No Charging” message? Is the charging cannot start or continues to fail after several attempts? Is the charging LED indicator light is either blinking continuously or stays off, indicating no power or charging activity? Is the charger not responding to user inputs or the mobile app interface? Are they any physical damage or unusual noises during operation?^state=2^assignment_group=8d6a391b83a71e108eb710c5eeaad33b^EQ
